posts.author: becca_colesoft (Becca C)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add a Formula Column setting for the user to specify the intended output format type

What are you trying to achieve

Currently Formula columns can’t be formatted, and can’t be used in workflows or automations in any meaningful way. If there was a formula column setting to specify what the intended format of a formula output should be (number, currency, date, text, etc.), it would help with displaying data and could also enable Monday to allow a formula column to be used as a data source in automations and workflows.
